zh.lifeSummary: Rogasia de Tricarico是Goffredo di TRICARICO和Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico的女兒，於1155年出生在艾歐洛。她與Roger le Vieux Sanseverino Conte di Tricarico結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1188年享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tricarico
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Vito, Donato, Angelo, Carlo, Gilda, Mauro, Pasquale, Sal, Santo, Serafino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from Tricarico in Matera province, named after the Latin personal name Tricarius.

en.lifeSummary: Rogasia de Tricarico was born in 1155, in Europe as the daughter of Goffredo di TRICARICO and Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico. She married Roger le Vieux Sanseverino Conte di Tricarico. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1188, at the age of 33.

ru.lifeSummary: Rogasia de Tricarico родилась в 1155 г. в местности Европа. Её родителей звали Goffredo di TRICARICO и Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger le Vieux Sanseverino Conte di Tricarico. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1188 г. в возрасте 33 лет.
